# Skill: draft-proposal

## Purpose
Produce a consolidated charter amendment proposal based on approved arbitration output and the shortlisted proposed revisions from the synthesis wave.

## Trigger
Human invokes this skill from `LOOP.md` Step 5 (Draft Proposal & Validation Wave) after arbitration approval.

## Inputs
- Latest `docs/charter_evolution/SYNTHESIS_WAVE_<N>.md` — proposed revisions shortlist
- `docs/governance/dissensus_ledger.md` — resolved and irreducible tensions
- `docs/charter_evolution/POLYCENTRIC_CHARTER_v0.1.md` — current canonical charter
- Arbitration record from `arbitrate` skill run

## Steps
1. Collect all approved proposed revisions from the synthesis wave.
2. Map each revision to the charter pillar or governance section it affects.
3. Draft the minimal charter changes needed — additions, deletions, or rewordings — preserving the existing structure.
4. Format the output as a diff-style proposal:
   ```
   ## Proposed change: <short title>
   **Affects:** <pillar / section>
   **Current text:** ...
   **Proposed text:** ...
   **Rationale:** <from synthesis>
   ```
5. Save as `docs/charter_evolution/PROPOSAL_WAVE_<N>.md`.
6. Run adversarial validation: re-invoke the `critique` skill on the proposal draft using the `governance` lens before human approval.

## Outputs
- `docs/charter_evolution/PROPOSAL_WAVE_<N>.md`

## No API calls
All content is generated by the human-controlled AI agent reading local files only. No external endpoints are contacted.
